# MarketBlocks UI

Universal open source component registry for marketing landing pages.
Built on shadcn/ui registry format and Tailwind CSS v4.
Works for any product type (SaaS, fintech, e-commerce, EdTech) and any market.
All components support configurable currency, input type, CTA mechanism, and locale.
Every component ships with professional default copy in Indonesian and English.

## Available components
- Hero (3 variants): hero-centered, hero-split, hero-minimal
- Social proof: logo-cloud, testimonial-grid, testimonial-marquee, stats-counter
- Features: features-grid, features-alternating
- Pricing: pricing-simple, pricing-toggle
- CTA: cta-centered, cta-split
- Navigation: navbar-simple
- Footer: footer-simple, footer-minimal
- Misc: faq-accordion, lead-capture-form, announcement-bar, hero-video

## Install
npx shadcn@latest add https://marketblocks-ui.dev/r/hero-split.json

## Registry
https://marketblocks-ui.dev/r/{name}.json

## Key props
- inputCapture.type: "email" | "phone" | "text" | "none"
- inputCapture.prefix: "+62" | "+1" | "+234" | any
- currency.symbol: "Rp" | "$" | "€" | "₦" | any
- currency.position: "before" | "after"
- currency.separator.thousands: "." (ID) | "," (US)
- cta.variant: "button" | "pill" | "pill-outline"
- headlineAccentIndices: highlight specific words in accent color
- background: "light" | "dark" | "gradient"
- trustSignals: configurable rating, users, award, media badges

## Default copy
Each component includes professional default copy in:
- Indonesian (ID) — casual, warm, WhatsApp-oriented
- English (EN) — professional, direct, email-oriented

## Content context presets
Available per component for: SaaS, Finance, E-commerce, EdTech
Each preset includes culturally appropriate headlines, CTAs, trust signals,
and microcopy with correct number/currency formatting.
